mapper.sql: player_id, losses, win_pct, innings_outs, hits_allowed, home_runs_allowed, walks_allowed, hbp_allowed, strikeouts, runs_allowed, earned_runs, whip, complete_games, shutouts, quality_starts, blown_saves, batters_faced, pitches_thrown, opponent_avg, wild_pitches, balks, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM player_pitcher_stats ORDER BY player_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO player_pitcher_stats ( player_id, losses, win_pct, innings_outs, hits_allowed, home_runs_allowed, walks_allowed, hbp_allowed, strikeouts, runs_allowed, earned_runs, whip, complete_games, shutouts, quality_starts, blown_saves, batters_faced, pitches_thrown, opponent_avg, wild_pitches, balks ) VALUES ( #{playerId}, #{losses}, #{winPct}, #{inningsOuts}, #{hitsAllowed}, #{homeRunsAllowed}, #{walksAllowed}, #{hbpAllowed}, #{strikeouts}, #{runsAllowed}, #{earnedRuns}, #{whip}, #{completeGames}, #{shutouts}, #{qualityStarts}, #{blownSaves}, #{battersFaced}, #{pitchesThrown}, #{opponentAvg}, #{wildPitches}, #{balks} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE losses = VALUES(losses), win_pct = VALUES(win_pct), innings_outs = VALUES(innings_outs), hits_allowed = VALUES(hits_allowed), home_runs_allowed = VALUES(home_runs_allowed), walks_allowed = VALUES(walks_allowed), hbp_allowed = VALUES(hbp_allowed), strikeouts = VALUES(strikeouts), runs_allowed = VALUES(runs_allowed), earned_runs = VALUES(earned_runs), whip = VALUES(whip), complete_games = VALUES(complete_games), shutouts = VALUES(shutouts), quality_starts = VALUES(quality_starts), blown_saves = VALUES(blown_saves), batters_faced = VALUES(batters_faced), pitches_thrown = VALUES(pitches_thrown), opponent_avg = VALUES(opponent_avg), wild_pitches = VALUES(wild_pitches), balks = VALUES(balks), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(innings_outs), 0) AS totalOuts, COALESCE(SUM(strikeouts), 0) AS totalStrikeouts, COALESCE(SUM(walks_allowed), 0) AS totalWalks, COALESCE(SUM(home_runs_allowed), 0) AS totalHomeRuns, COALESCE(SUM(hits_allowed), 0) AS totalHitsAllowed, COALESCE(SUM(earned_runs), 0) AS totalEarnedRuns FROM player_pitcher_stats WHERE innings_outs IS NOT NULL
